description: Classifies insurance claim denials and routes to the appropriate appeal pathway.

metadata.label: Denial Intake
metadata.description: Collect the Explanation of Benefits (EOB) and denial letter details.

metadata.label: Denial Classification
metadata.description: Use LLM to classify the denial reason into a category.

metadata.label: Medical Necessity Denial?
metadata.description: Check if the denial is for medical necessity.

metadata.label: Coding Error?
metadata.description: Check if the denial is due to a coding or billing error.

metadata.label: Medical Necessity Appeal
metadata.description: Draft appeal letter with clinical justification for medical necessity.

params.llm_prompt: Draft a medical necessity appeal for: {denial_reason}

metadata.label: Coding Error Appeal
metadata.description: Draft appeal citing correct CPT/ICD codes.

params.llm_prompt: Draft a coding error appeal for: {denial_reason}

metadata.label: General Appeal
metadata.description: Draft a general appeal letter for other denial types.

params.llm_prompt: Draft a general insurance appeal for: {denial_reason}

metadata.label: Navigator Review
metadata.description: Hand off the completed appeal to a Community Equity Navigator.
